meta.title: Lé Vibe — monorepo session backlog (unified install + maintainer STEP 14 verify + post-install smoke OK)
meta.workspace_summary: Dogfood manifest (SESSION_ORCHESTRATION_SPEC). Both epics done; STEP 14 verify + post-install smoke OK 2026-04-14. E1: 902 passed, 1 skipped; playbook docs-chain plus STEP14 build-env defaults export guard + exact APP_NAME/ORG_NAME lines + export-order (set -a < APP < ORG < set +a) + export-count==2 + set +a tail guard + no export BINARY_NAME + BINARY_NAME stays codium comment E1-locked. .lvibe/ not authoritative vs docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md. Added STEP 17 contract anchoring AI Pilot visible multi-agent observability wording (near-real-time witness, not a black box).
meta.rag_notes: Authority: docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md (wins vs .lvibe/). STEP 14 verified on-host. E1 902/1 skipped; playbook chain contracts plus test_build_env_lvibe_defaults_step14_contract set -a/set +a guard, exact APP_NAME/ORG_NAME export lines, export-order assertions (set -a < APP < ORG < set +a), exact export-count==2, set +a tail guard, no export BINARY_NAME invariant, and BINARY_NAME stays codium comment anchor. Added test_pm_stage_map_step17_contract AI Pilot observability anchor (near–real time + witness + not a black box).

session_steps.title: Describe what you want to build
session_steps.description: Optional; unified-install epic in this manifest is marked done — see product.epics and meta.continue_construction_note.

session_steps.title: Master orchestrator scans project
session_steps.description: Use monorepo tree + this manifest + .lvibe/ for context.

session_steps.title: Load agents and RAG context
session_steps.description: Enable skill agents per manifest; attach manifests and docs pointers.

session_steps.title: Iterate PM epics and tasks
session_steps.description: Walk product.epics in order — all tasks currently done. Add a new epic when docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md prioritization (or PM) defines the next increment.

engineer_completion_protocol: Whenever an engineer agent changes code, it must finish with clean, scoped git commits.
Before task completion, engineer agents must push their branch/commits to the remote and report push status.
If push is blocked (permissions/network/policy), mark task blocked with explicit reason and required operator action.

milestones.objective: Install path delivers Continue + YAML + Lé Vibe continue-config pairing without mandatory manual setup; verifiable in CI/smoke.
acceptance: One automation path installs continue.continue@pin and redhat.vscode-yaml (or pinned YAML) after first-run YAML exists.
sync-continue-config remains idempotent; repair command documented if marketplace fails.
Tests or smoke scripts assert critical invariants where feasible without blocking headless CI.

epics.title: Unified install / setup — Continue + YAML + orchestrator config
epics.description: PM_STAGE_MAP STEP 7 (H4) + STEP 14.h; end-to-end per docs/continue-extension-pin.md and packaging/bin/le-vibe-setup-continue.

tasks.title: Extend setup/install scripts: pin Continue + install redhat.vscode-yaml before/after sync per policy
tasks.notes: Files: packaging/scripts/install-continue-extension.sh, packaging/bin/le-vibe-setup-continue, optionally packaging/continue-openvsx-version companion pin for YAML.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: le-vibe-setup-continue (or successor) installs both extensions; order documented; non-fatal network failure does not break apt.

tasks.title: Integrate automation into default install/first-run (no mandatory manual le-vibe-setup-continue)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Fresh install + lvibe <ws> reaches usable Continue without user running separate setup except documented repair.

tasks.title: Tests, smoke, operator docs aligned with new flow
tasks.acceptance_criteria: pytest + contract tests green; README reflects happy path; PM_STAGE_MAP pointers still true.

epics.title: Maintainer — full-product .deb + verify-step14-closeout (PRODUCT_SPEC §7.3 / STEP 14)
epics.description: Requires editor/vscodium/VSCode-linux-* and both .deb artifacts on a build machine — docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md, docs/apt-repo-releases.md, PM_STAGE_MAP STEP 14 row. Not replaceable by .lvibe/ session notes.

tasks.title: Run verify-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb after stack + le-vibe-ide .deb builds (optional --json, --apt-sim)
tasks.notes: 2026-04-14: preflight-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb all OK; verify-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb exit 0 (apt-sim not run). Artifacts: ../le-vibe_0.1.9_all.deb, packaging/le-vibe-ide_0.1.3_amd64.deb, VSCode-linux-x64/bin/codium.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: verify-step14-closeout exits 0 where both .debs exist; optional manual-step14-install-smoke on test host per docs.

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Smoke script exits 0 after install; record host OS if policy allows — not required for merge.
